headlines.title: James Talarico says he ‘missed the mark’ on ‘cringey’ comments as Texas general election starts
headlines.description: Texas state Rep. James Talarico said Wednesday that previous comments he’s made on sensitive cultural issues “missed the mark,” as Republicans lean on those remarks to attack him in the contentious Senate race.

headlines.title: U.S. plans to send Americans exposed to Ebola to facility in Kenya
headlines.description: The Trump administration is preparing a quarantine facility in Kenya for Americans who have been exposed to Ebola amid the escalating outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, an administration official said Wednesday

headlines.title: Biden sues Justice Department to stop release of interview tapes
headlines.description: Former President Joe Biden has filed a lawsuit against the Justice Department to prevent the release of audio from interviews that he conducted with a ghostwriter of his memoir. NBC News’ Monica Alba reports on how President Donald Trump reacted to the lawsuit.

headlines.title: Trump Touts UFC White House Event as 'Greatest Show on Earth'
headlines.description: President Donald Trump is promising “the greatest show on Earth” at the White House as construction crews build a temporary arena on the South Lawn for UFC Fight Night. The mixed martial arts matches are scheduled for June 14 to celebrate America’s 250th anniversary and tickets will be free.

headlines.title: Trump: Iran is ‘negotiating on fumes’ as deal remains unclear
headlines.description: President Donald Trump said he only plans to make a good deal with Iran, or not make a deal at all, as Iranian state media released a draft of what they said was an alleged peace deal outline. NBC News’ Monica Alba reports that the White House called the released memorandum a “fabrication.”

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: Trump says he may attend Knicks’ NBA Finals game in New York
headlines.description: President Donald Trump said he thinks he will attend an NBA Finals game after the New York Knicks advanced to the finals for the first time in 27 years.“They have some great players,” Trump told reporters during the White House cabinet meeting on Wednesday.

headlines.title: Gavin Newsom takes a populist turn on AI ahead of a possible 2028 presidential run
headlines.description: AI is becoming a dominant political issue, with many on the right and the left coalescing around concerns about the rapid growth of the industry.

headlines.title: Biden sues DOJ to stop release of audio from interviews with ghostwriter of his memoir
headlines.description: The former president is urging a judge to block the release of recordings and transcripts of his private conversations with the ghostwriter of his 2017 memoir.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: Democrat Johnny Garcia wins Texas House primary after rival’s antisemitic comments
headlines.description: Democrat Johnny Garcia has won his party’s primary in Texas’ 35th Congressional District, NBC News projects, defeating a rival whom party leaders had condemned for antisemitic comments as Democrats look to compete in a district Republicans redrew to their benefit

headlines.title: Rep. Julie Johnson unseated in Texas Democratic primary by predecessor Colin Allred
headlines.description: Former Rep. Colin Allred has unseated Rep. Julie Johnson.
